title: DeFi Security Summit 2025 | Recap Video from Buenos Aires edition
description:
Every year, DSS brings together top minds in blockchain, auditing, and security — from white-hat hackers and protocol developers to academic researchers and industry leaders. The goal? To tackle the most pressing issues in DeFi security head-on — from smart contract exploits and cross-chain vulnerabilities to governance threats and beyond.

DSS 2025 marked the 4th edition of the DeFi Security Summit, and our biggest gathering so far.

Hosted in Buenos Aires, Argentina during Devconnect week, this year’s event brought together world-class researchers, auditors, builders, founders, and security experts for three days of deep technical content and high-energy community moments.

Across keynotes, panels, workshops, and hallway conversations, DSS 2025 showcased the latest insights in smart contract security, formal verification, operational security, bridging and L2 risks, MEV, fuzzing, incident response, and more.

A massive thank you to all speakers, sponsors, volunteers, and attendees who make DSS possible each year.

🎥 Enjoy the official recap video and relive the best moments.
